drl:
rule "R0"
salience($b0_1_0 + $b0_1_0)
when
    (or (and T2(f0 matches "[a-z]*", f0 in ("alpha", "zz"), $b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f1) T0(f1 == $b0_0_0, $b0_1_0 : f0, $b0_1_1 : f0)) (and T2(f0 matches "[a-z]*", f1 == true, $b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f1) T0(f1 == $b0_0_0, $b0_1_0 : f0, $b0_1_1 : f0)))
then
end
rule "R1"
salience 4
when
    T0($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T1(-1));
    insert(new T1(-1));
end
rule "R2"
salience 3
when
    T0(f1 != false, f0 not in (5.5, 7), f0 > 5 || f0 == 2 || !(f1 == false), $b2_0_0 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
rule "R3"
salience 10
when
    T1(f0 not in (100, 2, 0), f0 in (-1, 3.0, 4.5))
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T2("", false));
    insert(new T2("alpha", true));
end
rule "R4"
salience -6
when
    T2(f1 == false)
then
end
rule "R5"
salience 8
agenda-group "gb"
when
    $p5_0 : T0(f0 >= 0.5, !(f0 > 100))
then
    delete($p5_0);
end
